title: SSJU Time Table 2026 - Download Soban Singh Jeena University Exam Date Sheet PDF

detail.title: SSJU Time Table 2026 - Download Soban Singh Jeena University Exam Date Sheet PDF
detail.short_info: The officials of SSJU have released the SSJU Time Table 2026 for B.Ed/M.Ed, L.L.B and L.L.M. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

sections.heading: SSJU Time Table 2026 - Download Soban Singh Jeena University Exam Date Sheet PDF

content.text: Quick Summary: SSJU Time Table 2026 has been released at ssju.ac.in. Students can download the Soban Singh Jeena University exam schedule for B.Ed/M.Ed, L.L.B and L.L.M. Check exam dates, download steps, and important updates below.

sections.heading: SSJU Time Table 2026 Highlights

rows: 3rd and 5th Semester B.Ed/M.Ed, L.L.B and L.L.M

sections.heading: Download SSJU Time Table 2026 - Direct Links

rows: All Education & Law Odd Semester Courses

sections.heading: Latest Updates on SSJU Time Table 2026

items: SSJU Time Table 2026 for Education & Law Odd Semesters released on February 4, 2026
Time table available for B.Ed & M.Ed III Semester, L.L.B III & V Semester, L.L.M III Semester (Main/Ex/Back)
Schedules cover regular and backlog/supplementary examinations
Available on official exam schedule page at ssju.ac.in
Students must check reporting time and exam center details

sections.heading: What is SSJU Time Table 2026?

content.text: The SSJU Time Table 2026 is the official examination schedule released by Soban Singh Jeena University for the academic year 2025-26. This document contains crucial information including:

items: Exact exam dates for each subject/paper
Exam timing and duration
Course-wise and semester-wise schedule
Regular and supplementary exam dates
Important instructions for students

content.text: Students appearing for 3rd and 5th Semester B.Ed/M.Ed, L.L.B and L.L.M examinations must download the Soban Singh Jeena University time table to prepare their study schedule effectively.

sections.heading: How to Download SSJU Time Table 2026? (Step-by-Step)

content.text: Follow these simple steps to download your SSJU exam date sheet 2026:

sections.heading: Method 1: Direct Download from Official Website

items: Visit Official Website: Go to ssju.ac.in
Navigate to Examination Section: Look for "Student" > "Exam Schedule" or direct link
Click on Time Table/Date Sheet: Find the relevant programme for Education/Law odd semesters
Select Academic Year: Choose current session
Choose Your Course: Select B.Ed/M.Ed, L.L.B, L.L.M or specific semester
Select Exam Type: Regular/Supplementary/Backlog
Download/View: View the schedule (may be image/PDF) and save/print
Save and Print: Take a printout for reference

sections.heading: Method 2: Quick Access (Use Links Above)

content.text: Use the links provided in the table above to access the official exam schedule page and view your SSJU Time Table 2026 instantly.

sections.heading: SSJU Time Table 2026 - Course Wise Details
Important Information About SSJU Examinations 2026
Before the Exam - Checklist

items: Download and verify your SSJU Time Table 2026
Check your exam center and reporting time
Download admit card from ssju.ac.in
Prepare valid photo ID proof
Review exam pattern and marking scheme
Note down important exam guidelines

sections.heading: Documents Required for Exam

items: Admit Card (mandatory)
Valid Photo ID (Aadhar/PAN/Driving License)
College ID Card
Blue/black pen (multiple)
